phase_6.approval_basis: User authorized continuation after P6 verification: 3/4 legs passed on LLOYD, drift 0% on fresh populate, RAG provider correctly switched to ollama under CODEREF_RAG_LOCAL_ONLY=1, zero LLOYD-data pollution in coderef-core tree. Rag leg's chunk-conversion failure recorded as 3 follow-up tickets (FOLLOW-UP 1/2/3 in P6-VERIFICATION.md), not Phase 6 blockers.

history.note: Phased plan authored bundling STUB-A + STUB-B + STUB-C from WO-SCANNER-MODULE-EXTRACTION-001 follow-ups. Local-only Ollama RAG constraint baked in. Drift fail-fast bypassed at creation (driftPercentage=18); Phase 3 fixes the underlying bug.

history.rationale: Multi-phase + multiple distinct deliverables + public CLI surface touched.

history.summary: All 7 phases executed across 7 commits on branch wo/unified-coderef-pipeline. P1 baseline -> P2 doc-gen --project-dir -> P3 drift mtime rework -> P4 RAG local-only guard -> P5 unified pipeline CLI -> P6 LLOYD verification -> P7 docs.

history.result: 3/4 legs OK (scan/populate/docs). drift 0% on fresh populate. provider=ollama under CODEREF_RAG_LOCAL_ONLY=1. Zero LLOYD-data pollution in coderef-core tree. Rag leg fails on pre-existing chunk-converter bug -> 3 follow-up tickets recorded in P6-VERIFICATION.md.

handoff.note: Workorder complete. Branch wo/unified-coderef-pipeline pushed to origin (HEAD: ffe971c). User-initiated merge to main is the next discrete step.
